eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Coffey, KS; at 12:02 PM on JUN 11, 2019 Effective until 2:02 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Coffey County Emergency Management was conducting a Required Weekly Test of the IPAWS EAS system & the test message may have went live on some EAS Stations. Disregard any warnings for Coffey County, the message does read it is a test. No Action Required
